🔍 Jicho — Crop Health AI + Knowledge Base

AI diagnosis, crop encyclopedia, soil guide, pest database — everything a farmer needs.

📷 AI Crop Diagnosis
How Jicho AI works: Upload a photo of your crop leaves, stems, or fruit. Our AI checks against 50,000+ disease patterns from CGIAR, CIMMYT, and IITA research databases. Results are linked to our local treatment suppliers and experts.
📸
Tap to upload a crop photo
Leaf, stem, fruit or soil — any part
Analyzing with AGRI-NEST AI…
Checking 50,000+ disease patterns · CGIAR · CIMMYT · IITA
⚠️
Bean Rust (Uromyces appendiculatus)
Confidence: 87% · Severity: Moderate
Rust pustules detected on lower leaf surface. Orange-brown spore masses visible. Early stage — treatment within 48 hours recommended.
💊 Recommended Treatment
✅ Organic: Neem oil solution (3ml/L water) — morning/evening spray
🔬 Chemical: Mancozeb or Propiconazole at label dosage
📋 Manage: Remove infected leaves; avoid overhead irrigation
📡 Regional Pest Alerts3 Active
🐛
Fall Armyworm — Iringa (Active)
14 farms reported. Inspect maize urgently. View guide →
🍄
Bean Rust — Mbeya (Spreading north)
Moving toward Iringa. Preventive spray advised.
🐝
Low Pollinator Activity
Sunflower yields may be affected this week. Avoid pesticides.

🐔 Poultry Disease Alerts
⚠️
Newcastle Disease — nearby flock (5km away)
Vaccinate all birds immediately with I-2 thermostable vaccine. Do not move birds.
💊
Gumboro (IBD) Season Starting
Vaccinate chicks at 14 and 28 days old. Gumboro causes high mortality in 3–6 week broilers.

👨‍🌾 Mshauri — Expert Network

Verified agronomists, vets, and extension officers. Pay per consultation.

6
Verified Experts

4
Available Now
💬
1,847
Consultations Done
⭐
4.8
Avg. Rating
💡 How Mshauri Works
1️⃣
Choose an Expert
Filter by specialisation or availability. All experts are TARI/TALIRO verified.
2️⃣
Book a Session
Pick a date and time. Pay fee via M-Pesa — held in escrow until session completes.
3️⃣
Get Advice
Voice call, video, or in-person field visit. Receive written report after session.
4️⃣
Rate & Review
Your review helps other farmers. Expert's Trust Score updates after each session.

DateTypeDescriptionAmountVATReceipt #
Mar 8IncomeBeans sale — John KombaTZS 768,000TZS 118,153REC-2026-001

ℹ️ TRA Guidance for Smallholders
Threshold: Farmers earning below TZS 11.5M/year are exempt from income tax (Finance Act 2023).
VAT: Only required if annual turnover exceeds TZS 200M. Below this: exempt.
Withholding Tax: If you sell to companies, they deduct 2% WHT. Collect WHT certificates for refunds.
TIN Registration: Get your TIN at any TRA office or online at tra.go.tz — required for bank accounts and contracts.

Due dateApr 24, 2026
Interest rate18% p.a.
📱 M-Pesa Payment Steps:
  1. Dial *150*00# on your phone
  2. Select Lipa → Paybill
  3. Business number: 123456
  4. Account: LOAN-{your phone number}
  5. Enter amount and PIN
Your loan balance updates within 5 minutes.
Each repayment earns +2 Trust Score points. Full repayment earns +15 points.
